rule_metadata.name: ft_rtf
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: Hit on RTF files by triggering on RTF file magic

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_rtf
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20141204"
		desc = "Hit on RTF files by triggering on RTF file magic"

	strings:
		$rtf = { 7B 5C 72 74 66 }

	condition:
		$rtf at 0
}
